title: RaveDAO (RAVE) Explodes 132% to Reach $19.25, Climbing to #24 Market Cap Ranking
excerpt: RaveDAO has delivered a stunning 132.80% surge in 24 hours, propelling the token to $19.25 and securing its position as the 24th largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization. This explosive rally highlights growing investor interest in DAO governance tokens and community-driven blockchain projects.
